description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical lotion container with a dark blue background adorned with white snowflake graphics near the top, giving it a winter-themed appearance. The body of the container features white printed text in a non-English language, with a prominent block of text on one side and a smaller block on the opposite. The top and bottom edges are capped in white, suggesting a plastic construction. The branding and logo are visible in white near the lower section, and the overall design is sleek and modern. The container appears to be lightweight and portable, suitable for personal care use in urban environments.
description: A tall, dark blue cylindrical lotion container with white snowflake graphics and printed text, capped in white for a sleek, modern look.
description_view_0: This view shows the back of the container with a large block of white text and snowflake graphics at the top.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the cylindrical shape and the continuation of the snowflake pattern, with minimal visible text.
description_view_2: This view displays the front, featuring a prominent block of white text and the brand logo near the bottom.
description_view_3: This angled view shows the side with partial text and the top label, as well as the snowflake graphics.
